name: GrantApplication
description: DAOIP-5 GrantApplication — a project's submission to a grant pool. Richer reviewStage enum projects losslessly to DAOIP-5 6-value status.

global.schema:
type GrantApplicationState {
  # DAOIP-5 canonical GrantApplication
  grantPoolsURI: URL
  grantPoolId: PHID
  grantPoolName: String
  projectsURI: URL
  projectId: PHID
  projectName: String
  createdAt: DateTime
  contentURI: URL
  discussionsTo: URL
  licenseURI: URL
  isInactive: Boolean!
  applicationCompletionRate: Float
  socials: [AppSocial!]!
  fundsAsked: [AppFundingAmount!]!
  fundsAskedInUSD: Amount_Fiat
  fundsApproved: [AppFundingAmount!]!
  fundsApprovedInUSD: Amount_Fiat
  payoutAddress: PayoutAddress
  status: ApplicationStatus!           # DAOIP-5 canonical 6-value enum
  payouts: [Payout!]!
  extensions: String

  # Powerhouse additions
  paymentTerm: PaymentTerm
  reviewStage: ReviewStage!             # richer lifecycle (additive)
  feedbackNotes: String
  revisionCount: Int!
  submitter: AppSubmitter
  submittedAt: DateTime
  reviewedBy: String
  reviewedAt: DateTime
}

enum ApplicationStatus {
  pending
  in_review
  approved
  funded
  rejected
  completed
}

enum ReviewStage {
  DRAFT
  SUBMITTED
  OPENED
  UNDER_REVIEW
  NEEDS_REVISION
  REVISED
  APPROVED
  CONDITIONALLY_APPROVED
  REJECTED
  WITHDRAWN
  FUNDED
  COMPLETED
}

enum PaymentTerm {
  MILESTONE_BASED_FIXED_PRICE
  MILESTONE_BASED_ADVANCE_PAYMENT
  RETAINER_BASED
  VARIABLE_COST
  ESCROW
}

enum AppSubmitterType {
  COMMUNITY
  VERIFIED_PUBLISHER
  AUTOMATION
}

type AppSubmitter {
  submitterType: AppSubmitterType!
  identifier: String!
  submittedAt: DateTime!
}

type AppSocial {
  id: OID!
  platform: String!
  url: URL!
}

type AppFundingAmount {
  id: OID!
  amount: Amount!
}

type PayoutAddress {
  addressType: String!
  value: String!
}

type Payout {
  id: OID!
  payoutType: String!
  value: String!
  proof: String
  timestamp: DateTime!
}
global.initialValue: {"grantPoolsURI": null, "grantPoolId": null, "grantPoolName": null, "projectsURI": null, "projectId": null, "projectName": null, "createdAt": null, "contentURI": null, "discussionsTo": null, "licenseURI": null, "isInactive": false, "applicationCompletionRate": null, "socials": [], "fundsAsked": [], "fundsAskedInUSD": null, "fundsApproved": [], "fundsApprovedInUSD": null, "payoutAddress": null, "status": "pending", "payouts": [], "extensions": null, "paymentTerm": null, "reviewStage": "DRAFT", "feedbackNotes": null, "revisionCount": 0, "submitter": null, "submittedAt": null, "reviewedBy": null, "reviewedAt": null}

operations.name: SET_POOL_REF
SET_PROJECT_REF
SET_CREATED_AT
operations.reducer: state.createdAt = action.input.createdAt;

operations.name: SET_APP_CONTENT_URI
operations.reducer: state.contentURI = action.input.contentURI || null;

operations.name: SET_DISCUSSIONS_TO
operations.reducer: state.discussionsTo = action.input.discussionsTo || null;

operations.name: SET_APP_LICENSE_URI
operations.reducer: state.licenseURI = action.input.licenseURI || null;

operations.name: SET_IS_INACTIVE
operations.reducer: state.isInactive = action.input.isInactive;

operations.name: SET_COMPLETION_RATE
operations.reducer: state.applicationCompletionRate = action.input.applicationCompletionRate || null;

operations.name: SET_APP_EXTENSIONS
operations.reducer: state.extensions = action.input.extensions || null;

operations.name: ADD_APP_SOCIAL
operations.reducer: state.socials.push({id: action.input.id, platform: action.input.platform, url: action.input.url});

operations.name: REMOVE_APP_SOCIAL

modules.name: funding
modules.description: Funds asked, funds approved, payout address, payment term

operations.name: ADD_FUNDS_ASKED
operations.reducer: state.fundsAsked.push({id: action.input.id, amount: action.input.amount});

operations.name: REMOVE_FUNDS_ASKED
SET_FUNDS_ASKED_USD
operations.reducer: state.fundsAskedInUSD = action.input.fundsAskedInUSD || null;

operations.name: ADD_FUNDS_APPROVED
operations.reducer: state.fundsApproved.push({id: action.input.id, amount: action.input.amount});

operations.name: SET_FUNDS_APPROVED_USD
operations.reducer: state.fundsApprovedInUSD = action.input.fundsApprovedInUSD || null;

operations.name: SET_PAYOUT_ADDRESS
SET_PAYMENT_TERM
operations.reducer: state.paymentTerm = action.input.paymentTerm;

operations.name: SUBMIT_APPLICATION
OPEN_APPLICATION
START_REVIEW

errors.name: InvalidStartReviewError
errors.description: Cannot start review from current reviewStage.

operations.name: REQUEST_REVISION

errors.name: InvalidRequestRevisionError
errors.description: Cannot request revision from current reviewStage.

operations.name: MARK_REVISED
APPROVE_APPLICATION
CONDITIONALLY_APPROVE

errors.name: InvalidConditionalApproveError
errors.description: Cannot conditionally approve from current reviewStage.

operations.name: REJECT_APPLICATION
WITHDRAW_APPLICATION
RECORD_PAYOUT
operations.schema:
input RecordPayoutInput {
    id: OID!
    payoutType: String!
    value: String!
    proof: String
    timestamp: DateTime!
}

operations.name: MARK_COMPLETED
